curation_notes: The advisory explicitly references commit flarum/framework@440bed8 as the patch. Only one source file was changed: js/src/common/Translator.ts (renamed to .tsx). The patch adds HTML escaping of string parameters in the preprocessParameters method by wrapping them in JSX fragments before returning. The pre-patch code returned raw string parameters that were then rendered as HTML DOM nodes, enabling XSS through any user input field that passes through the translation system.
